title: Greek Peas Gratin
description: A creamy, flavorful side dish made with peas, feta cheese, and a crispy breadcrumb topping.
instructions: 2. In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
3. Add the peas and cook until tender.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the feta cheese, gruyère cheese, and flour.
5. Add the butter to the skillet and stir until melted.
6. Pour the cheese mixture into the skillet and stir until combined.
7. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
8. Top with bread crumbs and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
